title: Lane closed, traffic redirected following Louis Fourie accident
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has issued a notice of temporary road closure, following a motor vehicle accident on Louis Fourie Road today, 24 December.


> The lane in the direction of Hartenbos has been closed to traffic, from the Garret Street robots.


Vehicles are being directed through Hartenbos.

Read more on sister publication, Mossel Bay Advertiser

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
